mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recite_day_record ( plan_day_id, plan_id, student_id, book_name, day_label, mode, total_count, correct_count, wrong_count, accuracy, answers_json ) VALUES ( #{planDayId}, #{planId}, #{studentId}, #{bookName}, #{dayLabel}, #{mode}, #{totalCount}, #{correctCount}, #{wrongCount}, #{accuracy}, #{answersJson} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, plan_day_id, plan_id, student_id, book_name, day_label, mode, total_count, correct_count, wrong_count, accuracy, answers_json, created_at FROM recite_day_record WHERE id = #{id} AND student_id = #{studentId} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, plan_day_id, plan_id, student_id, book_name, day_label, mode, total_count, correct_count, wrong_count, accuracy, answers_json, created_at FROM recite_day_record WHERE plan_day_id = #{planDayId} AND student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT id, plan_day_id, plan_id, student_id, book_name, day_label, mode, total_count, correct_count, wrong_count, accuracy, answers_json, created_at FROM recite_day_record WHERE plan_day_id = #{planDayId} AND student_id = #{studentId} AND mode = #{mode} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
